message:
test(widgets): add 30 unit tests for notification queue, VOI overlay, and status line

- notification_queue: 14 tests covering config defaults, priority ordering,
  is_empty states, visible_mut, config accessor, dismiss_all stats, action
  equality, stats defaults, empty positions, stack rendering edge cases
- voi_debug_overlay: 6 tests covering empty/narrow render areas, observation
  ledger entry formatting, decision equation section, VOI equation format,
  overlay data clone
- status_line: 10 tests covering spinner rendering/cycling/width, progress
  edge cases (zero total, 100%), spacer width/render, default trait, multiple
  right items, key hint width

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
